name: job_silver_blob_reports_monthly
description: Silver transformation for monthly JSON reports (kpi_report, sla_report, state_breakdown). Runs on the 2nd of each month after Bronze report files are written — reads Bronze JSON, flattens nested fields, applies data quality, writes to three Silver Delta tables.

tasks.description: Run Silver report transformation for all 3 report types. Reads Bronze JSON from bronze-volume/reports/YYYY/MM/, flattens each report type, writes Silver Delta tables.
